CustomField.description: Set to true synchronously by the engine when Platform Event auto-suppression fires during an execution (org daily PE delivery >80% consumed). Allows getJobStatus() to return isPeSuppressionActive: true immediately, without waiting for the async CMDT Is_Platform_Events_Disabled__c write to commit. Cleared on subsequent job starts. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Is Platform Events Auto-Suppressed
